hero.title: Plan unforgettable events, together
hero.subtitle: From weddings to baby showers, from birthdays to dinners — plan, invite and celebrate together with the people who matter.

items.title: Any event type
items.description: Birthdays, weddings, dinners, baby showers and more — all in one place.

items.description: Create beautiful digital baby cards and optionally link them to a meet-and-greet event.

showcases.title: Smart RSVP system
showcases.description: No more endless group chats. Guests can respond per event part — ceremony, dinner, party — and share dietary preferences right away. You see who's coming in one clear overview.

showcases.title: Wishlists that work
showcases.description: Add gifts to your wishlist and share it with your guests. They can claim items or even chip in together for a bigger present. No more duplicate gifts.

showcases.title: Find the perfect date together
showcases.description: No date set yet? Suggest multiple options and let your guests indicate when they're available. Pick the date that works for the most people.

hero.title: Everything you need to plan the perfect event
hero.subtitle: Powerful tools that make planning any event easy and fun.

items.title: Any event type
items.description: Whether it's an intimate birthday or a grand wedding — create any type of event and customise it to your liking. Set up sub-events for multiple parts in one day.

items.title: Digital baby cards
items.description: Design a beautiful digital baby card and share it with family and friends. Optionally link a meet-and-greet event so everyone can come admire the little one.

items.title: Smart RSVP system
items.description: Guests respond per part of your event. Set whether they can bring a +1, collect dietary preferences and keep everything organised in one dashboard.

items.title: Date polling
items.description: No date yet? Suggest multiple options and let invitees vote. The system automatically shows which date works for the most people.

items.title: Wishlists
items.description: Create a wishlist for your event. Guests can claim items so you don't get duplicates. Bigger gifts? Those can be purchased together.

items.title: Secret chat
items.description: A hidden chat room where invitees can discuss surprises, share gift ideas and plan something special together — without the host seeing.

items.title: Photo & video gallery
items.description: Guests can upload photos and videos during and after the event to a shared album. Collect all memories in one place.

items.title: Budget tracker
items.description: Track all expenses and split costs between co-organisers. Set a budget and see in real time how much is left.

items.title: Seating arrangements
items.description: Plan your seating layout visually. Drag guests to tables and account for preferences and group arrangements.

items.title: Event timeline
items.description: Create a detailed schedule for the day. From the ceremony to dessert — everyone knows exactly when everything happens.

items.title: Custom invitations & themes
items.description: Personalise your event with custom colours, fonts and invitation designs. Make it truly yours.

hero.title: Simple, transparent pricing
hero.subtitle: Choose the plan that suits you. Upgrade or downgrade anytime.

items.question: Can I upgrade at any time?
items.answer: Yes, you can upgrade to a higher plan at any time. The difference is calculated pro-rata for the remaining period.

items.question: How does billing work?
items.answer: You are billed monthly via automatic payment or credit card. You can cancel at any time.

items.question: Can I cancel my subscription?
items.answer: Yes, you can cancel at any time. You keep access to your plan until the end of the current billing period.

items.question: Is there a free trial?
items.answer: The Free plan is always free. For Plus and Premium you can try 14 days free without a credit card.

items.question: What happens to my events if I downgrade?
items.answer: Your existing events keep their features. Events you already created retain their tier. Only new events are affected by the downgrade.

items.question: Can I pay per event instead of subscribing?
items.answer: Yes! You can purchase Standard or Pro features for a single event without a monthly subscription. This is ideal if you're planning just one special event.

hero.title: How can we help?
hero.subtitle: Find answers to frequently asked questions or get in touch.

items.question: What is Fishionaire Events?
items.answer: Fishionaire Events is an all-in-one platform for planning events, inviting guests and organising together. From birthdays to weddings, everything in one place.

items.question: Is Fishionaire Events free?
items.answer: Yes! With the free plan you can create up to 3 events with basic features. For more features you can upgrade to Plus or Premium.

items.question: What types of events can I create?
items.answer: Any type of event: birthdays, weddings, dinners, baby showers, corporate events, and more. You can also create digital baby cards.

items.question: What devices does Fishionaire Events work on?
items.answer: Fishionaire Events works on any device with a web browser — desktop, tablet and mobile. No separate app needed.

items.question: How do +1s work?
items.answer: As an organiser you can set whether guests may bring a +1 (or more). Guests indicate this when RSVPing and you see the total in your dashboard.

items.question: Can guests RSVP per sub-event?
items.answer: Yes! If your event has multiple parts (e.g. ceremony, dinner and party) guests can indicate per part whether they'll attend.

items.question: How do dietary preferences work?
items.answer: For events with a dinner, guests can share their dietary preferences when RSVPing. You get an overview of all preferences in your dashboard.

items.question: Can I set an RSVP deadline?
items.answer: Yes, you can set a deadline after which guests can no longer respond. You can also send reminders to guests who haven't responded yet.

items.question: How do I claim an item?
items.answer: Click on an item in the wishlist and choose 'I'll buy this'. The item is then marked as claimed so others won't buy it too.

items.question: Can items be split?
items.answer: Yes! For more expensive items the 'Buy together' option can be enabled. Multiple guests can then contribute to the same gift.

items.question: Can the host see who buys what?
items.answer: No, the host only sees which items are claimed, not by whom. This way the surprise is preserved.

items.question: How does date polling work?
items.answer: Create a date poll with multiple options. Share the link with invitees and they indicate which dates work for them. The system shows which date is best.

items.question: What is the secret chat?
items.answer: The secret chat is a hidden chat room where invitees can discuss surprises and gifts amongst themselves, without the host being able to see.

items.question: Can I add co-organisers?
items.answer: Yes, you can invite other people as co-organisers. They then get access to edit and manage the event.

items.question: Who can see my event?
items.answer: Only people you invite have access to your event. Events are private by default and not findable via search engines.

items.question: How is my data protected?
items.answer: We use encryption for all data and store it in secure data centres in the EU. We never share your data with third parties.

items.question: Can I delete my account and data?
items.answer: Yes, you can delete your account at any time. All your data will then be permanently removed, including events and guest lists.
